comments.body: This saved me from spinning up a real backend just for the demo, thanks!
Would love to see an example with authentication middleware.
We switched from a hand-rolled Express mock to this and cut setup time in half.
Any plans to support GraphQL as well?
Clear write-up, the profile watcher example was especially useful.
The _sort and _order params worked exactly like typicode's json-server.
Pagination with X-Total-Count made it trivial to wire up the UI.
The CrudPanel factory pattern is a nice touch, less boilerplate per resource.
Using this in our Cypress suite instead of mocking fetch calls directly.
Finally a monorepo example that actually documents the workspace setup.
The edit modal reusing the same form as create is a good simplification.
Great for demoing the frontend to stakeholders without a real API.
